100.text: The sentient eagerly agrees before you even complete your request. Gain sentient [b]Item 1351[/b].

101.text: The large insect is incredibly fast, and it makes a game of dodging you. It sidles next to you when it understands that you’re willing to indulge its whims in a playful, non-aggressive way. Gain animal [b]Item 853[/b].

102.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1169[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1207[/b]. Otherwise, the chest snaps shut on your finger; lose 1 health and gain 1 boost.

103.text: The animals back away in fear as you rummage through their tent. Go to interior [b]Location 549[/b].

1034.text: You open the package, eager to see what’s inside. Roll a skill die to determine the contents of the package:After you have dismantled the package, lose item [b]Item 1034[/b].

choices.outcome: A large insect leaps out of the package, its talons slashing into your shoulder before attempting to scamper away. Lose 1 health. Then roll 3 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. If you pay [2694d0]1 move[-], you dash after the beast and capture it (gain animal [b]Item 1221[/b]). Otherwise, the insect escapes and you gain 1 boost.

choices.option: [a84fc0]look[-]
[fd8c46]engage[-]
choices.outcome: Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions).

choices.option: [0b955e]help[-]
[fff349]take[-]
[ec1c3b]overpower[-]

104.text: As you reach for the fruit, the animal vanishes into thin air. You have a few seconds to study the details of your current location before there’s a flurry of movement in the grove, then the trap door slams shut. Go to [b]Location 511[/b] and continue.

1046.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1046.text: The future flashes in your mind’s eye. Roll 2 challenge dice. You may continue; if you do, count those 2 dice against the total dice to be rolled for the new action. Otherwise, place the dice in the center (ignore the results) and gain 1 boost on this flora.

1047.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1047.text: You burst into uncontrollable, contagious laughter. You may continue; if you do, gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-]. Otherwise, gain 1 morale.

1048.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1048.text: You feel energized beyond what you would call natural. Gain lesson [b]Item 1424[/b]. You may continue; if you do, gain [a84fc0]1 look[-].

1049.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1049.text: A few seconds after eating the petal, you look down at your hands to see that they’re translucent—you can see right through them! You may continue; if you do, ignore 1 challenge die result. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

105.text: The beast pecks at you as you secure one of its legs so it can’t fly away. Gain animal [b]Item 803[/b].

1050.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1050.text: You feel something awaken deep inside of you, like one of your organs was operating suboptimally and now it’s reawakened. You may continue with a [0b955e]help[-] action, ignoring any health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1051.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1051.text: As the petal melts in your mouth, the absurd tangle of bones casts a shadow that tells of possible futures. Roll 3 skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the selected skill.

1052.text: The brown bulb bursts open to reveal at least a liter of cool, clear water. You may continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower[-] action, ignoring any health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1053.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1053.text: Your mind springs to life, opening to possibilities previously beyond your comprehension. Gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b]. You may continue; if you do, gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-].

1054.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1054.text: Your body becomes buoyant enough to walk briefly on water. You may continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action across water, reducing the cost to 1. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1055.text: You avoid the razor-sharp petals, pinching free a berry and tossing it in your mouth. You may continue with a different [fff349]take[-] action, reducing the cost by half (round up the new cost). Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1056.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny patch of soft needles from the bush
1056.text: You discover that the turvy fir is crawling with insects—that’s why so many birds are attracted to it. Choose one:

choices.option: Swallow the needles, insects and all
choices.outcome: Once you get past the earthy taste, you find that the insects are full of protein. You’re proud of yourself for trying something different. Gain 1 health; you may continue with a [fff349]take[-] action, ignoring all morale results on challenge dice.

choices.option: Spit it out

1058.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1058.text: Even the slightest nibble sends the tree into a blind rage. Refresh all challenge dice from adjacent cards and lose 1 health.

1059.text: The berry is plump and delicious, and you immediately feel a surge of adrenaline. You may continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower[-] action, ignoring any time results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

106.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the moss with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson [b]Item 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

1060.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1060.text: As you chew on the torch grass, a warm sensation spreads from your mouth throughout your body. You may continue, ignoring cold damage during your next action. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1061.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1061.text: The kelp tastes strongly of blood. You fight through the flavor, hoping that you don’t develop vampiric tendencies. You may remove a boost from a sentient in your grid; if you do, gain 1 health and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1062.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1062.text: Your entire body begins to glow, illuminating the surrounding area with perfect clarity. You may continue with a [a84fc0]look[-] action, changing the result of 1 challenge die to another die face. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1063.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1063.text: The flower has a salty, acidic taste, and it leaves welts on your tongue. Gain 1 boost; unless you continue, lose 1 health.

1064.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1064.text: As you chew on the petal, you feel an instant boost to your memory. You may continue; if you do, gain 1 boost on your character and 1 random skill. Otherwise, gain 1 boost here.

1065.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1065.text: If you’re on a location with a cold arrival penalty, suffer 1 cold damage. Otherwise, you may either continue and ignore heat damage during your next action, or gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1066.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1066.text: Your sense of sight is temporarily heightened. You may continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action; if you do, first look at all adjacent listed locations. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1067.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1067.text: The vibrant flower creates the sensation of tiny fireworks in your mouth. You’re overwhelmed with a passion for life and a desire to connect. You may continue with an [fd8c46]engage[-] action, ignoring all time results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1068.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1068.text: You feel a surge of strength from the spicy flower. You may continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower[-] action; if you do, you may reroll any challenge dice once. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1069.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1069.text: As you chew on the molten petals, your skin temporarily grows a solid-yet-flexible crust. You may continue, ignoring all health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

107.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1026[/b] and 2 boost.

1070.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1070.text: The golden leaf melts on your tongue, and for at least a few moments you feel 10 years younger. You may continue; if you do, first refresh all dice from your character card. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1071.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1071.text: You instantly regret the choice—this is not an edible flower. Lose 1 health and gain 1 boost; you may continue.

1072.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1072.text: You conceive the spark of an idea. You may continue; if you do, choose 1 skill, roll 4 skill dice, and gain all results matching the chosen skill. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1073.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1073.text: A strong sense of courage surges through you, and you’re ready to throw caution to the wind. You may continue, ignoring all morale results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1074.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1074.text: You avoid the sizzling ends of the flora and eat one of the dark purple flowers. You may continue with a [a84fc0]look[-] action, on the initial roll ignoring all time results and rerolling all morale results. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1075.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1075.text: The flower gives the inside of your mouth a small static shock from its stored energy. Gain 1 boost. You may continue; if you do, you may first move any number of boost from here to your other cards.

1076.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1076.text: You’re overwhelmed with a strong sense of empathy for the world around you. You may continue with a [0b955e]help[-] action; if you do, decrease the cost by up to 2 available [0b955e]help[-] skills (without anyone spending them). Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1077.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1077.text: The bark tastes like the burnt end barbecue pork your grandfather claimed to make, even though you knew he was buying it from a local restaurant. It explodes with flavor. You may continue; if you do, roll 3 skill dice, and if there are any [fd8c46]engage[-] results, keep them and roll 3 skill dice again (repeat until you don’t roll any [fd8c46]engage[-]). Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1078.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1078.text: As soon as the flower touches your lips, you know it was a bad idea. Your lips and mouth become numb and your vision grows blurry. You collapse on the ground. Lose 1 time and gain 1 boost.

1079.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1079.text: As you chew the crisp leaf, you feel your fingers and feet grip your surroundings in a remarkable way. You may continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action; if you do, before you roll, choose a type of result to ignore. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

108.text: You nimbly-yet-quietly spring into the grove and snatch the shield. Gain item [b]Item 939[/b]. The surrounding mushrooms erupt, spewing lava in your path. In an attempt to avoid the scalding liquid, roll 4 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-].

1080.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1080.text: Your eyes lose focus for a moment, and after you blink a few times, you realize that you can see exponentially farther than before. Before the effects wear off, you may look at an adjacent location (you may reference the depart storybook). Continue.

1081.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1081.text: The leaf melts on your tongue, and suddenly you feel your body rise a few centimeters off the ground—you’re levitating! You may continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action, ignoring all morale results. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

1082.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a tiny taste of the flora
1082.text: The mushroom is dripping a gooey, hot, sap-like substance, so you dip your finger and lick it. The flavor is a little spicy, and even your finger tingles from contact with the substance. You may continue with a different [fff349]take[-] action; if you do, you may reroll any challenge dice once. Otherwise, gain 1 boost on this flora as a result of your deepened understanding of its nutritional properties.

109.text: The sentient waits patiently while you empty their pockets, extracting a pack of herbs. When it’s clear that you’ve missed some coins, the sentient hands them to you too, complimenting your skills as a petty thief. Gain flora [b]Item 1075[/b] and $3.

110.text: The animal attempts to bite you. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-]. Gain animal [b]Item 845[/b].

111.text: Large shards of the shattered orb are scattered on the ground. Gain item [b]Item 1194[/b].

112.text: As happy as the animal is to have company, it doesn’t like being trapped. Gain animal [b]Item 851[/b].

113.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

1136.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a nibble of the mushroom (pay 1 boost from this card)
1136.text: Eating strange mushrooms is always a roll of the dice, so roll 2 skill dice. If either result is [ec1c3b]overpower[-], lose 1 health. For any other result, gain 1 health. Also, if the result is a pair (other than [ec1c3b]overpower[-]), you may refresh all challenge dice and continue.

115.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via a forgotten side door
115.text: The rusty lock takes some convincing, but the door eventually swings open. Go to interior [b]Location 553[/b].

116.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

117.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] either the crystal or the rowboat
117.text: Gain 3 random skills, then choose one:

choices.option: Extract the crystal from its invisible tether (pay a total of [a84fc0]1 look[-], [fd8c46]1 engage[-], [0b955e]2 help[-], and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-])
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 1011[/b]. Each player who contributed at least 1 skill gains 1 time, 1 morale, and 1 health.

choices.option: Extract the rowboat
Suffer but try again (pay 1 time, 1 morale, and 1 health)
choices.outcome: Without the sacrifice of skills, the dark magic of the crystal resists the extraction but finally succumbs to your efforts. You are drained but successful. Gain item [b]Item 1011[/b].

118.action: [fff349]GRAB[-] the animal as it flies by
118.text: You time your attempt perfectly, and the scaled creature goes limp as your arms wrap around it. Gain animal [b]Item 804[/b].

119.text: Your eyes lose focus for a moment, and after you blink a few times, you realize that you can see exponentially farther than before. Before the effects wear off, you may look at an adjacent location (north is [b]Location 124[/b] and south is [b]Location 114[/b]). Continue.

012.text: You can’t resist the glimmer of gold. Gain $10 and exit to [b]Location 649[/b].

120.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] for a loose board on the dock
120.text: You pry off an old but serviceable plank. Gain item [b]Item 1180[/b].

121.text: You quietly push off into open water, careful to ensure the owner of the boat doesn’t see you. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b] and $4.

122.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

1224.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] some fruit (pay 1 boost from this card)
1224.text: The fruit is refreshing and delicious. Gain 1 health.

123.action: [fff349]HACK[-] the obelisks to show your location to your companions
123.text: The device is made to transmit information beyond this planet, including visuals. So you hack it to project a map of this part of the world into the sky. Open the Book of Vantages to page 4 so all players can see it; you are at the bottom of the NE-4 quadrant. Gain ability [b]Item 1472[/b], 1 morale, and 1 boost.

124.action: [fff349]HACK[-] the security system so it views you as a metal sentient
124.text: Gain ability [b]Item 1472[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 554[/b].

125.text: You piece together some information from the entrance to the tunnels and the surrounding sentients, who have gathered to watch you attempt the puzzle. For your next location action here, decrease the cost by X.

126.text: The heat singes your fingers as you handle the chest (suffer 1 heat damage). Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 895[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

1265.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1265.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1266.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to make food

1267.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to make armor

1268.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to make medicine

1269.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to make weapons

127.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] for lost items in the dirt near the lorestones
127.text: You mostly find tiny trinkets and tokens at the base of the lorestones from other visitors; out of respect, you leave them on the ground. You can’t resist picking up a flag that has fallen into the mud, along with some coins. Gain item [b]Item 1188[/b] and $2.

1270.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the knowledge necessary to make maps

1271.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the knowledge necessary to design games

1272.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to make beverages

1273.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to make wind items

1274.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the mediation skills necessary to run the embassy

1275.action: [fff349]WISH[-] for fortune (pay 1 boost from this structure; perform this action at most once per game)

1276.action: [fff349]PICKPOCKET[-] a few distracted sentients in the audience
1276.text: The sentients are rapt in the drama of the performance. Gain $X.

1277.text: One particular sentient is a nuisance to other customers, so you twist their words in such a way that they end up sleeping on the haystacks and you gain their mode of transportation, a skywhale. Gain animal [b]Item 840[/b].

1278.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to make garments

1279.action: [fff349]FORAGE[-] for treats to better care for animals

128.text: Despite their strength and combat skills, you remove the sword from their grasp and let its power flow into you until it recognizes you as its rightful owner. Gain item [b]Item 1005[/b] and perform no other location actions here.

1280.action: [fff349]GATHER[-] information to better serve your school
1280.text: For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

1281.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

1282.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to make vehicles

1283.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1283.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1284.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to make accessories

1285.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to maintain the ideal temperature

1286.text: For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

1287.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] a small crystal from the attached crystal cave
1287.text: Roll a skill die and gain the corresponding crystal: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Item 1160[/b]), [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Item 1161[/b]), [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Item 1162[/b]), [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Item 1163[/b]), [fff349]take[-] ([b]Item 1164[/b]), [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Item 1165[/b]).

1288.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to grow these dangerous plants

1289.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1289.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

129.text: You can see a green light emitting from inside the spire, so you find a loose rock and wiggle inside. Gain ability [b]Item 1511[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 555[/b].

1290.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1290.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1291.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] the resources necessary to grow these rare plants

1292.action: [fff349]ACQUIRE[-] a map of the world’s cities
1292.text: A sentient, oblivious to your plans, sketches a map of the world’s cities and towns. Gain item [b]Item 1251[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (find your region in the [a84fc0]look[-] storybook, then view page 9 in the Book of Vantages).

013.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] the most beautiful item from the hostel
013.text: The nicely crafted flint catches your eye; gain item [b]Item 1128[/b]. Then exit to [b]Location 719[/b].

130.text: Choose which sentient’s dice to steal:

choices.option: Left sentient
Right sentient
choices.outcome: There’s nothing special about these dice. Gain 1 boost.

1305.action: [fff349]SWINDLE[-] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

choices.option: Fool the wind sentient into believing that you’re raising funds to throw a massive party
Perfectly execute a long con involving a stolen identity, a bait-and-switch, and a big twist at the end (lose 1 time)
Convince the wind sentient that you saw a tornado just around the corner and they should let you hold their coin purse while they check it out

1306.action: [fff349]SWINDLE[-] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

choices.option: Fool the wind sentient into believing that you’re raising funds to throw a massive party

Convince the wind sentient that you saw a tornado just around the corner and they should let you hold their coin purse while they check it out

131.action: [fff349]GRAB[-] your choice of the tent or a torch from the fire and scamper away
131.text: Gain either the tent ([b]Item 1032[/b]) or a torch ([b]Item 1041[/b]).

1310.action: [fff349]SWINDLE[-] the sentient (perform this action at most once per game)

choices.option: Fool the sentient into believing that you’re raising funds to create an ice machine to expand the reach of heat-sensitive circuitry
Perfectly execute a long con involving a stolen identity, a bait-and-switch, and a big twist at the end (lose 1 time)
Convince the sentient that you saw a gold sentient pillaging a nearby connection port and they should let you hold their coin purse while they check it out

151.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

152.text: As you chew the crisp leaf, you feel your fingers and feet grip your surroundings in a remarkable way. You may continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action; if you do, before you roll, choose a type of result to ignore. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

153.text: You’re in full parkour mode as you nimbly-yet-quietly spring onto the island and snatch the amulet. Gain item [b]Item 1176[/b]. The six large birds nearby shriek and attack in formation. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

154.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

155.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

156.text: The Traveler talks about the fire sentients that occupy this area: they are master artisans—patient to a fault and focused on offering the gift of fire and forge to the world through items like torches, orbs, and runecasters. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

157.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the rock with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson [b]Item 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

160.action: [fff349]COERCE[-] the guards to grant you access
160.text: You hold one guard hostage while the other frantically debates the choice between their job and their friend. You promise not to hurt anyone and that you’ll only take what you need, and they look the other way while you walk inside. Go to interior [b]Location 562[/b].

161.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] the sentient’s possessions while they work
161.text: All you can find is a metal shield and some coins. Gain item [b]Item 930[/b] and $2.

162.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are occupied with a large egg, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

163.text: You feign friendliness as you draw close to the beast, then you grab it with a commanding grip at the last second. It instantly falls into tepid submission, though fear does not inspire instant loyalty. Gain animal [b]Item 813[/b].

164.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] a shiny item from the eye
164.text: You spring across the gap and reach into the eye to extract an amulet. As you do, a sentient bursts from the lava below and vows to avenge their mother. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Gain item [b]Item 1176[/b].

165.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

166.text: As you walk by the tree toward the house, one of the sizzling boils bursts open, burning your shoulder. Suffer 1 heat damage. The commotion alerts the owner of the house to your presence, and they chase you away. Go either east to [b]Location 167[/b] or west to [b]Location 165[/b].

167.text: As tired as the sentient seems, it’s difficult to tear anything away from the strong grip of their many appendages. Gain item [b]Item 962[/b] and $3.

168.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell [b]Item 1383[/b] and continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

1687.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1687.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1688.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1688.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1689.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1689.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

169.text: Despite the Traveler’s warnings not to steal from this sacred fount, you take some lava. It cools in the water enough to handle. Gain item [b]Item 1182[/b] and curse [b]Item 1394[/b].

1690.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1690.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1692.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
