170.text: With great effort, you pull the rock away from whatever sorcery that tethers it to the arch. As soon as you do, it stops spinning and loses its aura. It’s just a rock. Gain item [b]Item 1179[/b].

1701.action: [fff349]BATHE[-] grime off your tired body (if you already have 5 or 6 morale, perform another action)
1701.text: The warm, bubbly water of your bathtub feels great. Gain 2 morale.

1705.action: [fff349]HIJACK[-] the vessel so you can continue your adventure on this planet
1705.text: You catch the small crew off guard, as they were expecting you to be happy to see them. Lose destiny [b]Item 1705[/b], gain vehicle [b]Item 1033[/b] and destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center), and proceed with the next player’s turn.

171.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the orb’s interior without touching the lava
171.text: As you poke your head into the orb, you’re surprised to find a stone sentient inside. Fortunately, they’re curious about you, and there’s enough room for two inside. They show you that the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-4. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill.

172.text: With the leaf sentients seemingly disinterested in steering away from the volcano, you take over the ship, declaring yourself captain. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1156[/b] and $4.

173.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1026[/b] and 2 boost.

174.action: [fff349]ENDURE[-] the onslaught of waves in front of the judges (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
174.text: Find card [b]Item 1708[/b] and place it on the table. To earn the respect of fire sentients, you must keep the flame of the Mother Volcano lit despite the tide. It is a trial of wits as much as it is patience, especially as the end of the trial nears and 5 waves emerge from the water.You clamber onto the lowest stone outcropping (height 1) just before the first wave hits. The sacred flame is safe… but the stone starts to crumble, and you must soon jump to another outcropping. Study the other 4 waves so you can use each outcropping (i.e., determine which unique height of 2, 3, 4, and 5 is associated with each wave, starting with the 2nd wave and ending with the 5th wave) exactly once and keep the flame burning.See entry [b]Location 174[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

175.text: You pin down the sentient as you fill a flask with the sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b] and curse [b]Item 1387[/b].

176.text: There isn’t much to take other than a trinket and a few coins. Gain item [b]Item 1102[/b] and $2.

177.text: The people in the surrounding area are furious that you would steal one of these flags. Gain item [b]Item 1188[/b] and curse [b]Item 1387[/b].

178.text: The sentient is pleased to see you consume the flower, and they do the same. They open up about how the flowers in this area are suffering, and their people have been trying to revive them through the power of dance. Gain 1 boost, [2694d0]1 move[-], and quest [b]Item 1629[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

179.text: You feel an intense compulsion to connect with the nearby sentient. Without even realizing it, you find yourselves in a deep conversation about life, nature, and love. When the effects wear off, you part ways, and you realize the sentient has given you a beautiful flute. Gain item [b]Item 949[/b].

180.action: [fff349]ENLIST[-] the sentient to join your journey
180.text: It takes some convincing, but the elderly sentient eventually admits that they’re curious to learn about wind patterns in other parts of the world. Gain sentient [b]Item 1308[/b].

181.action: [fff349]SWINDLE[-] the guards into opening the chest and steal the contents
181.text: The guards aren’t dumb, and you’re not particularly clever, but somehow you convince the guards to open the chest. Before they know it, you grab the contents and take off running. Gain item [b]Item 1021[/b] and go east to [b]Location 182[/b] or west to [b]Location 180[/b].

182.text: From your position on the ground, the sentient doesn’t expect such a maneuver. Gain item [b]Item 938[/b].

183.text: The sentient agrees, but only if you first travel east with them. Gain sentient [b]Item 1305[/b] and go east to [b]Location 184[/b].

184.text: The queen winks and welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]ENLIVEN[/b][-] action.

185.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the ruins of any items they contain
185.text: Gain [fff349]1 take[-] and go to interior [b]Location 542[/b].

186.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of large seeds, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

187.text: In full sneaky rogue mode, you pick the exact moment and angle to take the artifact. As you try to use it in secret, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 4 boost, you discover a way to play the horn (gain item [b]Item 1003[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-].

188.text: It’s hard to find anything that isn’t covered in rust, but you’re happy to find that one of the blades has been sharpened by the wind and sand over time. The owner of the turbine cries while you scavenge their machine. Gain item [b]Item 1189[/b] and lose 1 morale.

189.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, and the mud is nutrient rich. Unfortunately, you’re not the only creature who likes the sediment. When you stand up to dry, you find several leeches suckling on your feet. Gain 2 morale but lose 1 health. Continue.

190.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.option: Keep the stone
Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. Gain 1 boost. If you dare, you may continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action with its cost decreased by 1.

191.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1026[/b] and 2 boost.

192.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] a sealed jug from the grass
192.text: You pick up a container of sticky, yellow liquid. Gain item [b]Item 866[/b].

193.text: With the guidance of the Traveler, you discover that you can capture the most abundant natural resource of the prairie: wind. Gain item [b]Item 1212[/b].

194.text: You put a stop to the violent clash between dueling sentients, insisting that they settle their differences in a more productive way. They grumble but agree to put aside their magic and weapons, leaving them in your care as they talk through their issue. Gain items [b]Item 860[/b] and [b]Item 981[/b].

195.action: [fff349]HACK[-] into the interface of the gateway
195.text: A cash box swings open, revealing a pile of coins from fellow travelers who paid to use the gate. Gain $20; you may continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]ENTER[/b][-] action.

196.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

197.action: [fff349]ENLIST[-] the sentient after they finish their task
197.text: The sentient places the final flag in the ground, satisfied with their work. “Now what?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1307[/b].

198.text: As you move into the pliable glass of the orb, you find a sentient inside. Fortunately, they’re curious about you, and there’s enough room for two. They show you that the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-1. Gain 1 boost.

199.text: The sentient is so focused on the chest that they don’t notice the theft until you’re a safe distance away. Instead of giving chase, they give you a nod of respect. Gain item [b]Item 943[/b].

020.action: [fff349]SWAP[-] the magnetic rocks with crystals of equal size
020.text: With the magnets in hand, the barrier slides aside. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 080[/b].

200.text: After searching around the ledge, you find a stone that should be good for crafting. Gain item [b]Item 1179[/b].

201.action: [fff349]COERCE[-] the sentient into revealing secrets of the surrounding area
201.text: You can tell a part of them likes sharing how much they know. They recommend looking for a back-alley entrance if you want to visit Ingot Town to the north, or you can travel east to meet a good friend of theirs, a runecaster inspector. Gain 2 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

202.text: The sentient thinks you’re joking at first. You persist, and they realize you’re serious. “I would curse you,” they say, “but I admire your courage. One does not simply walk into this area and steal from metalfolk.” Gain item [b]Item 1255[/b] and $2; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 12 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region F).

203.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] the contents of the building, keeping the metal sentient at bay
203.text: The metal sentient strains against your advance, but you outmaneuver them. Inside the dilapidated building you find a captive, whom you free. Gain sentient [b]Item 1349[/b] and curse [b]Item 1391[/b].

204.action: [fff349]ROB[-] the house when the owners are asleep
204.text: You creep into the home (go to interior [b]Location 556[/b] and lose 1 morale).

205.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

206.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of random knickknacks, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

207.action: [fff349]BYPASS[-] the king’s security system (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
207.text: Find cards [b]Location 538[/b] and [b]Location 539[/b] (they’re large cards), place them on the table, and begin. The King of Thieves offers you honorary status as a metal sentient if you can bypass a complex laser security system within a short amount of time. They share the repeating pattern of the lasers (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 1st, 2nd…). The laser array shifts every 2 seconds, and moving from one square to the next—orthogonally or diagonally—takes 1 second of your time. You cannot be on a square when any part of it is touched by a laser, and you only have 9 seconds (in the context of this puzzle, not real time) to move from the front of the grid to the back. Use cubes to track your movement, with the first cube placed in row A (the first second). See entry [b]Location 207[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

208.text: The inside of the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-3. Gain 1 boost.

209.text: The critter is nimble, but its weakness is its instinct to attack, and you use one of those attempted slashes to swipe and pin it down. Gain animal [b]Item 828[/b].

021.text: You carefully unplug the device so it remains functional. Gain item [b]Item 988[/b]; you may continue.

210.text: You notice that passing sentients all steer clear of the object. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

211.text: You aggressively extract a glowing amulet from the metal plates of the sentient’s armor. Gain item [b]Item 1174[/b] and $2.

212.text: The beast is slow but big, and it takes a while to pin it down. Gain animal [b]Item 829[/b].

213.text: You pierce through the guard’s portable forcefield and leave them pinned under a boulder while you enter the building. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain item [b]Item 982[/b]; go to interior [b]Location 513[/b].

214.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.option: Keep the stone
Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

215.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a zesty beverage at the bar
215.text: Gain 1 morale and 1 health. The bartender holds out their hand, waiting for payment. Choose one:

choices.option: If you don’t pay
choices.outcome: Immediately go south to [b]Location 210[/b] or west to [b]Location 396[/b].

choices.option: If you pay $1
If you pay $3
choices.outcome: The bartender leads you to interior [b]Location 557[/b] and leaves you alone.

216.text: Gleaming from the tundra underneath the skeleton is a yellow crystal; gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]. Continue.

217.text: You locate the source of the electricity and disconnect it. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [0b955e]help[-] results. Unless you are calculating in your efforts (pay [0b955e]1 help[-]), an angry sentient curses you (gain curse [b]Item 1391[/b]). You may go north to [b]Location 222[/b].

218.text: You grab the shard floating in the middle of the great, rocky donut and instantly black out. When you wake up a few minutes later with a splitting headache, your mind has expanded. Lose 1 health and gain lesson [b]Item 1431[/b].

219.text: The sentient respects your strongarm approach, but they really don’t want to abandon their post. The Traveler agrees to stand guard in their place, so you gain sentient [b]Item 1335[/b].

022.text: You realize that the laser array has only a few sources that you can modify to drop the barrier. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

220.action: [fff349]FORAGE[-] for a clear, carvable piece of ice
220.text: You find a transparent wedge of pure ice. Gain item [b]Item 1183[/b].

221.text: The beast is simply too strong to wrangle, so you instead dart around, tying its long, cabled necks in a knot. Gain animal [b]Item 808[/b].

222.text: The confused pup puts up a minor struggle in the snow. Gain animal [b]Item 810[/b].

223.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] for any lost items in the snow near the stones
223.text: Just as your fingers begin to freeze, you locate some coins. Gain $5.

224.action: [fff349]PICKPOCKET[-] a sentient walking in the opposite direction along the narrow path
224.text: The sentient is too preoccupied with keeping warm to notice your pilfering as you shuffle around them on the ledge. Gain item [b]Item 880[/b] and $X; you may continue.

225.action: [fff349]GRAB[-] your choice of the smaller tent or a torch and scamper away
225.text: Gain either the small tent ([b]Item 1032[/b]) or a torch ([b]Item 1085[/b]).

226.text: In the surrounding meadow there are a few small mushrooms and berries. They seem safe, and your stomach seems to agree. Gain 2 health.

227.text: It’s both unsettling and a bit magical to sit down on a blanket that supports your weight while remaining in midair. You untie the tethers and begin to fly. Gain vehicle [b]Item 985[/b].

228.action: [fff349]ENLIST[-] the sentient to travel with you
228.text: The sentient asks whether you’re able to “travel by tower.” You’re unsure of what they’re asking, and they explain that energy sentients can jump from one tower to the next across great distances. They don’t think this possible for a landwalker like you, but they’re fine traveling the old-fashioned way. Gain sentient [b]Item 1325[/b].

229.text: You notice other sentients gathering in the area, waiting for nightfall. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

023.text: The gate is solid, but you detect a few weak points around the edges. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

230.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] some of the nutrient-rich moss growing on the rocks
230.text: You munch on some moss while resting against the cliff to the near south. Gain 2 health and continue.

231.text: In full sneaky rogue mode, you pick the exact moment and angle to take the artifact. As you try to use it in secret, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 3 boost, you discover a way to use the gauntlet (gain item [b]Item 1001[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

232.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] a lantern from the nearby tree
232.text: Figuring there are so many lanterns here that one won’t be missed, you quietly unfasten a lantern’s chain from the tree. Gain item [b]Item 1187[/b].

233.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]TRANSLATE[/b][-] action.

234.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a petal of the nearby flower
234.text: You manage to avoid triggering the flower, which is just as much a trap as it is vegetation. The effects of the petal allow you to walk temporarily on top of the water. You may go north to [b]Location 239[/b] or continue.

235.action: [fff349]GATHER[-] intel from the Traveler about the energy sentients
235.text: “I may not always agree with what they say, but I love hearing them say it anyway—their ability to pick up new languages is astounding.” They point to an energy sentient in an orb to the north. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

236.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

237.text: When you think the sentient isn’t looking, you grab a torch. Gain item [b]Item 1086[/b].

238.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of books, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

239.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via a side window
239.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior [b]Location 565[/b].

024.text: You toss a few glowing stones into the darkness to gauge the width and depth. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

240.text: You surprise the current occupant of the orb. Fortunately, they’re curious about you, and there’s enough room for two inside. They show you that the orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-1. Gain 1 boost.

241.text: The stone resists, but you succeed. Gain item [b]Item 1161[/b].

242.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell [b]Item 1384[/b] and continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

243.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1028[/b] and 2 boost.

244.text: You surprise the current occupant of the orb, who informs you politely that the orb is occupied and that you’ll need to wait your turn. They mention that you can leave messages to other travelers on the orb exterior. Gain 1 boost and choose one:

choices.option: Interact with the orb’s exterior
choices.outcome: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Lose 1 time to wait for the sentient to finish their task
choices.outcome: When the sentient departs the orb, you enter to find that the orb displays a map of your region. Look at page 3 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NW-1. Gain 1 boost.

245.text: You notice that the plants are aggressive toward any passing animal. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

246.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

247.text: Exhaustion from arguing has left the sentients gullible enough to fall for your ploy, and all three pool their purses to pay for what is really nothing more than a ragged patch of your augsuit. Gain $6.

248.text: Goosebumps prickle your skin after you peel off your augsuit. The water feels amazing—really, even better than a good bath should feel, perhaps due to the proximity of the tree? Gain 2 morale and 1 health; you may continue.

249.text: You scale one of the standing stones while the moth-like beast watches. When it hovers too close, you jump on top of it, pinning it to the ground. Gain animal [b]Item 823[/b].

025.text: The gate is solid, but you detect a few cracks in the supporting stones. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

250.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the unattended box from the thorny ledge
250.text: Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to prevent any thorns from gouging your arm. Gain item [b]Item 952[/b].

251.text: The second you put your weight on the stone, it drops into the gaping pit below, bringing you with it. One of the spikes tears into your arm, and you black out from the pain. Lose 1 health and go to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

252.text: The sentient is incredibly hesitant to leave their collection of bones. You sense their anxiety and offer to carry temporarily the bones for them. Gain sentient [b]Item 1331[/b].

253.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 886[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1160[/b]. Otherwise, the treasure chest bursts into flames, scalding your hands (suffer 1 heat damage).

254.text: There is a large animal to the east, but it doesn’t seem to be the beast that left these hoofmarks. To the west, you think you can see a treasure chest. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

255.text: You convince the duo that you’re a famous hunter and that they would be silly not to join you. One doesn’t take the bait, but the other is smitten. Gain sentient [b]Item 1333[/b].

256.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].

257.text: With the sentient’s appendages pinned to their sides, they can’t stop you from robbing them. You find some coins in one pocket and some seeds in another, ignoring the animals. Gain item [b]Item 1021[/b] and $2.

258.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] a map from the peddler as the Traveler distracts them
258.text: You grab the map and scamper away. Gain item [b]Item 1254[/b] and curse [b]Item 1392[/b].

259.text: The lumbering beast proves difficult to wrangle, and it puts up a disinterested struggle. Gain animal [b]Item 824[/b].

026.action: [fff349]SWAP[-] the widgets with pieces of cooling lava of identical size
026.text: With the widgets removed, the barrier disappears before your eyes. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 086[/b].

260.text: For every arm you pin down, there are always several others swatting at you from all directions. Fortunately, it isn’t swatting to hurt, just to discourage. Gain animal [b]Item 825[/b].

261.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]HUNT[/b][-] action.

262.text: You bump against a sentient carrying a giant salad in both hands, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

263.text: You accidentally step on one of the nearby stones, and it cracks open, water gushing over your foot. The other roots and the flower instantly withdraw underground. You salvage a mouthful of water. You may continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower[-] action, ignoring any health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

264.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the ruins of any items they contain
264.text: Gain ability [b]Item 1511[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 543[/b].

265.text: When they’re not looking, you attach the restraints to a boulder of equivalent weight and hide with the tired captive. Gain sentient [b]Item 1314[/b].

266.action: [fff349]PICKPOCKET[-] a sentient with jingling pockets who stumbles out of the casino
266.text: The sentient is too busy recounting their streak of good luck to notice their immediate misfortune. Gain $X; you may continue.

267.text: You wait until the sentient flies away, then you run into the garden and grab a plant. Gain either an orange flower with many green leaves (flora [b]Item 1072[/b]) or a green flower with pink buds (flora [b]Item 1078[/b]).

268.action: [fff349]DISTRACT[-] the sinew sentient to help the leaf sentient escape
268.text: The leaf sentient darts away, offering their gratitude through an outburst of communicative odors. Gain 2 morale.

269.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a taste of the wind to help predict where it blows next
269.text: You quickly realize that this sandstorm is composed of something more interesting than sand. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

027.text: You realize that the laser array has only a few sources that you can modify to drop the barrier. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

270.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 924[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, the chest clamps on your leg like a trap; gain 1 boost and (if possible) lose 1 skill.

271.text: Within the bones, you unexpectedly find a well-crafted sword. Gain item [b]Item 892[/b].

272.text: You’re able to tug the sticky material toward you, but it snaps back into place. You can’t quite explain it, but you suddenly feel… lucky. Gain spell [b]Item 1372[/b].

273.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

274.text: As the petal melts in your mouth, the absurd tangle of bones casts a shadow that tells of possible futures. Roll 3 skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the selected skill.

275.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

276.action: [fff349]PICKPOCKET[-] the sentient whose back is to you
276.text: The sinew sentient is too engrossed in the game to notice your thievery. Gain item [b]Item 890[/b] and $X; you may continue.

277.text: Someone chained this poor creature to the wall and left it to feed on unsuspecting visitors, and it deserves better. Gain animal [b]Item 836[/b].

278.text: This area appears to be a chokepoint for anyone who tries to cross the lowest point of the wall. You’re almost undoubtedly walking into a trap. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

279.text: The sentient joins you inside the orb. The orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-3. The sentient appreciates your attention to detail, and they offer to travel with you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1344[/b].

028.text: You realize that as dangerous as the sentinel appears, they present a rare type of barrier that you can actually talk to. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

280.text: Once you get the sentient to start talking, they spill all sorts of secrets, including the excellent news that part of your ship crashed just north of here. There is a secret staircase inside the cliff that can take you there. Gain 1 boost; you may either go north to [b]Location 285[/b] or gain [2694d0]1 move[-].

281.text: Gain item [b]Item 1087[/b]. You may continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]ENTER[/b][-] action.

282.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].

283.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1031[/b] and 2 boost.

284.text: You nimbly-yet-quietly spring up the rock and snatch the crystal. Gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. The three treasure chests at the base of the rock burst open, guardians emerging from each and attacking in formation. Roll 5 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

285.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

286.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] one of the sentient’s possessions while they bicker with themselves
286.text: Gain one of the following: A torch ([b]Item 1087[/b]), a crystal ([b]Item 1160[/b]), or a coin purse ($6).

287.text: Amidst the rubble along the ledge, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.option: Keep the stone
Throw the stone toward the mountain
choices.outcome: The stone strikes its target, and you didn’t even throw that hard—perhaps the Memory Palace isn’t all that far away. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]NAVIGATE[/b][-] action.

288.text: The tiny beast seems to predict each of your attempts to catch it, and it snips at you with razor-sharp teeth. Gain animal [b]Item 834[/b].

289.action: [fff349]HIJACK[-] the balloon to travel across the gap
289.text: Feigning injury, you draw the balloon close enough to jump on board, surprising the crew. You mercifully let them debark on solid land before sailing away. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1023[/b] and $3.

029.text: You realize that the laser array has only a few sources that you can modify to drop the barrier. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

290.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].

291.text: To your amazement, at the moment when your hands should have slipped into the folds of their gown, instead they pass through the air as if the Traveler isn’t there at all. Gain 1 boost and continue.

292.text: The liquid is clear, crisp, and incredibly refreshing. Gain 1 health and continue.

293.text: The liquid is clear, crisp, and incredibly refreshing. Gain 1 health and continue.

294.action: [fff349]GRAB[-] your choice of the tent or a torch and scamper away
294.text: Gain either the tent ([b]Item 1032[/b]) or a torch ([b]Item 1085[/b]), then go east or west.

295.text: The sentient invites you into an orb—it looks solid, but it liquifies at your touch. You find yourself inside what is essentially a portion of the globe where you can see your current area. As an aimless wanderer on this planet, this sense of positioning and place makes you happy. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-2. Gain 1 boost and continue.

296.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] for any lost items near the stones
296.text: You locate some coins in the sand. Gain $5.

297.text: There are lorestones both to the east and the west. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

298.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] for any lost items in the cold sand near the stones
298.text: Just as your fingers begin to freeze, you locate some coins. Gain $5.

299.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

030.text: You realize that as dangerous as the sentinel appears, they present a rare type of barrier that you can actually talk to. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

300.text: You throw yourself onto the animal’s neck and hang on until it tires. Gain animal [b]Item 841[/b].

301.text: You slowly make your way down the mountain, biding your time until the sentients have departed. At the center of the circle you find the remains of some armor. Gain item [b]Item 974[/b]. You may pay 1 boost to go north to [b]Location 306[/b].

302.text: You furtively reach into one of the nests, your hands closing around a large egg. Either keep the egg (gain item [b]Item 1213[/b]) or eat it raw right away while it’s fresh (gain 2 health). Then, if you pay [2694d0]1 move[-], you may go north to [b]Location 307[/b].

303.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] a small stone to keep for yourself
303.text: You extract a small, nondescript rock. Gain item [b]Item 1179[/b].

304.text: A cannoneer was preparing to fire at the approaching pirate ship, but your distraction gives the ship time to dock safely on the other sky island. Its crew cheers for your act of sneaky hospitality. They invite you aboard for a celebration. Gain $5 and 1 morale. You may go to any adjacent location; north is [b]Location 309[/b] and east is [b]Location 404[/b].

305.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via a loose panel
305.text: Sand is piled around the back of the lighthouse, disguising several loose panels. You remove one and make your way upstairs. Go to interior [b]Location 597[/b].

306.text: You nimbly-yet-quietly spring onto the island and snatch the shard. Gain item [b]Item 1216[/b]. The five floating islands nearby hurtle toward you, and all you can do is smash them before they smash you. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

307.text: You take a beautiful piece of ivory from the skeleton. Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].

308.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the orb to see if it can help with the animal
308.text: The interior of the orb provides a broader view of the world but doesn’t provide insight into the injured animal. Look at page 6 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SW-3. Gain 1 boost. You may continue, but if you perform a location action, its cost is increased by 1.

309.action: [fff349]HIJACK[-] the ship by inspiring a mutiny
309.text: At the Traveler’s behest, you board and try to take over the ship. This is no small task; at first you keep your head down and listen for any disgruntled pirates. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]. You may either stop or continue with an [fd8c46]engage-◆4-[b]COAX[/b][-] action to empower a few disgruntled pirates to speak up (then read the next result only):

choices.option: Continue
choices.outcome: Soon after the selected pirates speak their mind, they are thrown in the brig. As you predicted, this retaliation fans the flames among the other pirates, and it helps you identify the snitch. Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆5-[b]CHARGE[/b][-] action to lead the mutiny (then read the next result only):

choices.option: Continue
choices.outcome: The mutiny begins before dawn, when the captain’s closest allies all find themselves tied to their beds on the ocean surface. The treasury is next. You force the lock and make a show of dividing the stashed loot evenly among every pirate on the ship. Finally, you personally toss the captain overboard and take over the helm, much to the delight of the crew. You are the captain now. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1017[/b].

031.text: You realize that as dangerous as the sentinel appears, they present a rare type of barrier that you can actually talk to. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

310.text: The most interesting thing you find is the bush itself, which is covered with vibrant flowers. Gain flora [b]Item 1067[/b].

311.text: The bird sees you coming, and sparks fly from its crest. Roll 4 skill dice. If the results include at least [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-], suffer 1 heat damage. Gain animal [b]Item 816[/b].

312.text: You quietly push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b] and $4.

313.text: You nonchalantly wade toward the animal and grab it firmly by the neck, not seeking to hurt it. Sparks literally fly from the bird’s head as you do. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Gain animal [b]Item 816[/b].

314.text: You quietly push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b] and $4.

315.text: The book is bound to the pedestal through some kind of sorcery, but you’re finally able to wiggle it free. Gain item [b]Item 1192[/b].

316.text: The animal responds to your aggressive move by releasing a cloud of tiny spores that make you cough uncontrollably. Suffer 1 hypoxia damage and gain animal [b]Item 843[/b].

317.text: You trip the animal, sending it sprawling to the ground. Seconds later, a huge lizard crashes through the bushes, clamps down on the insectile animal, and drags it away. You are too shocked to respond. Lose 1 morale and gain 1 boost.

318.text: In full sneaky rogue mode, you pick the exact moment and angle to take the artifact. As you try to use it in secret, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 3 boost, you discover a way to activate the artifact (gain item [b]Item 1008[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

319.text: Preoccupied by its task, the animal struggles only to continue etching. Gain animal [b]Item 817[/b].

032.text: The gate is solid, but you detect some rust around the hinges. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

320.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

321.action: [fff349]STALL[-] until the sentient disappears inside the building
321.text: A flood of young sentients appears and then shuffles back into the building, and then the plaza is empty. You find a quiet room inside the building; go to interior [b]Location 567[/b].

322.text: The sentient is devastated that you would destroy their creation with such callous disregard. Gain flora [b]Item 1071[/b] and curse [b]Item 1386[/b].

323.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] a flower from a nearby student
323.text: It looks more like a blue chopstick than a flower, but there’s something about it that excites your mind. Gain flora [b]Item 1053[/b].

324.text: The injured animal doesn’t try to evade you, but its ethereal composition makes it slightly awkward to wrangle. It collapses to the ground and its light grows dim. Gain 1 random skill, then choose one:

choices.option: Pay [fd8c46]1 engage[-] to call for aid
choices.outcome: A leaf sentient dashes over from the east. With a rapid series of gestures, the sentient helps stabilize the animal. “You did the right thing,” the sentient says. “Come, join us at the academy.” Go to interior [b]Location 600[/b].

choices.option: Pay [0b955e]1 help[-]
choices.outcome: You save the animal’s life; gain animal [b]Item 822[/b].

choices.option: Don’t do anything
choices.outcome: The animal perishes in your arms and fades away, leaving only an orange crystal in its wake. Gain item [b]Item 1162[/b].

325.text: The youngling trembles as you remove the web. Gain animal [b]Item 817[/b].

326.text: Grasping the animal is the easy part; the difficulty arises from avoiding the sharp barbs of its web. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-]. Gain animal [b]Item 819[/b].

327.text: Clearly the chest was a trap, and now you can proceed to pick or force the lock without any issues. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]2 engage[-] or [ec1c3b]2 overpower[-]; continue.

328.text: The sentient’s size is a disadvantage when dealing with scoundrels like you, and you pluck a hefty bag of coins from their side before they can react. They yell as you scamper away. Gain curse [b]Item 1393[/b] and $12.

329.text: You dart between the sentient’s long limbs and grab their only weapon. Gain item [b]Item 1088[/b] and continue.

033.text: You deduce the optimal landing area for a mighty leap. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

330.text: The Traveler gives you some pointers as you hack into the inner workings of the device. “Runecasters help sentients around the world to increase the efficiency of basic tasks. Here, just pair it to you.” Gain item [b]Item 1028[/b] and 1 boost.

331.text: The golden leaf melts on your tongue, and for at least a few moments you feel 10 years younger. You may continue; if you do, first refresh all dice from your character card. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

332.text: You bump into a sentient carrying a large barrel of ale, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

333.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] from the unsuspecting shop owner while they’re distracted by a customer who appears from the northern valley
333.text: You grab a welding torch and casually tuck it out of sight. Gain item [b]Item 873[/b] and $2.

334.text: You can’t find even a single coin on them, just some old cards. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions) and lose 1 morale.

335.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building from the blind side
335.text: The floorboards of the building creak as you slip inside. Go to interior [b]Location 569[/b].

336.action: [fff349]SWINDLE[-] the caravan into helping you cross the canyon
336.text: You convince the caravan into thinking you’re a potential customer, and they help you across the canyon. Once you’re on the other side, you scamper away. Go north to [b]Location 341[/b].

337.action: [fff349]SIPHON[-] coins from the base of the vehicle
337.text: The old transport is carrying more coins than it can handle. You exploit the weakness and walk away undetected with a handful of coins. Gain $10 and continue.

338.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the resort via an unattended window
338.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior [b]Location 570[/b].

339.text: In full sneaky rogue mode, you pick the exact moment and angle to take the artifact. As you try to use it in secret, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 4 boost, you activate the artifact (gain item [b]Item 999[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

034.text: You realize that as dangerous as the sentinel appears, they present a rare type of barrier that you can actually talk to. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

340.text: You quietly hoist the sails and push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1156[/b] and $4.

341.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRADE[/b][-] action.

342.action: [fff349]HIJACK[-] a sailboat that steers too close to shore
342.text: The boat’s owner begs you to let them keep the boat; they’ll even take you into the city and give you money for the market. If you accept, go to city [b]Location 529[/b] and gain $5. If you refuse, gain vehicle [b]Item 1156[/b].

343.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime, though the runoff from the nearby city isn’t entirely clean. Gain 1 morale and continue.

344.text: After luring the boat over to the dock, you push the captain into the water and take the helm. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1156[/b], curse [b]Item 1393[/b], and $4.

345.text: You take a rifle away from the hunters and send them running. The animal is on the brink of death. Gain item [b]Item 1153[/b] and either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; continue.

346.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via a side window
346.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior [b]Location 076[/b].

347.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

348.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

349.text: The effect of the flower is weak, but you can feel something working through your system. You find yourself waving to the nearby sentients as if they’re old friends. Gain 2 morale and continue.

035.action: [fff349]SWAP[-] the gelatinous bulbs with stones of identical size
035.text: With the bulbs in hand, the barrier vanishes before your eyes. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 095[/b].

350.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.option: Keep the stone
Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

351.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

352.text: The sentient is happy to try out other fishing holes in the area, so they quickly pack up their gear and join you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1361[/b].

353.text: The technology used in the tower is even more advanced than your augsuit. Some of the more mysterious elements bleed into your implants. Gain spell [b]Item 1377[/b].

354.text: You feel something awaken deep inside of you, like one of your organs was operating suboptimally and now it’s reawakened. You may continue with a [0b955e]help[-] action, ignoring any health results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

355.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

356.action: [fff349]DISTRACT[-] whatever is causing the water to spin
356.text: Downstream from the waterfall, you reach into the water and make a big splash. As you do, the spinning spikes disappear under the water, and you see a massive worm-like creature crash through the waterfall and disappear south. You have neutralized the dangerous sea centipede. Gain 1 morale and [2694d0]1 move[-]; continue.

357.text: You ensnare the animal, expecting praise from the building occupants; all you hear are grumbles from inside. Gain animal [b]Item 814[/b].

358.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] the treasure chest from the sentient
358.text: While they’re distracted by the Traveler, you quietly remove the treasure chest from the outcropping. Gain item [b]Item 1036[/b].

359.text: You grab the sentient’s fishing rod and pull them into the water. Gain item [b]Item 921[/b].

036.text: You toss a few pebbles into the darkness to gauge the chasm’s width and depth. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

360.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

361.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1031[/b] and 2 boost.

362.text: You instantly regret the choice—this is not an edible flower. Lose 1 health and gain 1 boost; you may continue.

363.text: With a storm brewing to the northeast, swimming underwater may be the safest route forward. Land isn’t too far away to the west, though. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

364.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1029[/b] and 2 boost.

365.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] for resources in the calm water under the surface
365.text: Some unrefined gold catches your eye. Gain item [b]Item 1185[/b].

366.text: There doesn’t appear to be anyone monitoring these traps, so you take one for yourself. Gain item [b]Item 932[/b].

367.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 924[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

368.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

369.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell [b]Item 1374[/b] and continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

037.text: The gate is solid, but you detect decay around it. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

370.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

371.text: A few seconds after eating the petal, you look down at your hands to see that they’re translucent—you can see right through them! You may continue; if you do, ignore 1 challenge die result. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

372.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Unfortunately, you aren’t alone in the water, as you learn when something sharp and many-toothed clamps down on your arm. You shake it free, but you’re badly injured. Lose 2 health and gain 1 boost. You may go to an adjacent location (north is [b]Location 302[/b]).

373.text: The long-necked beast is confused at first by the tiny creature—you—struggling against it, and you catch the creature off balance. It tips over, crashing into the sand, and you plant yourself at the base of its neck. Gain animal [b]Item 841[/b].

374.text: The crab-like beasts squeal as you pull the barrel out of the sand, lunging at you. You ward them away, and they skitter into the sea. Gain item [b]Item 1158[/b].

375.text: You lure the ship toward the rocks and then forcibly take control. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1156[/b], curse [b]Item 1388[/b], and $5.

376.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via a vent in the roof
376.text: The vent creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior [b]Location 571[/b].

377.text: The flower’s exterior is cool to the touch, but the inside contains a magma-like substance that splashes onto you. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain flora [b]Item 1069[/b].

378.text: These are savvy traders, but you manage to convince one of them a defunct piece of your augsuit is priceless. Gain an orange crystal ([b]Item 1162[/b]), a shovel ([b]Item 900[/b]), an explosive ([b]Item 879[/b]), armor ([b]Item 946[/b]), a runecaster map ([b]Item 1255[/b]), or a red flower ([b]Item 1069[/b]).

379.text: Using some loose rocks and keeping your distance, you separate some lava into a place where it can cool enough for you to pick up. Gain item [b]Item 1182[/b].

038.action: [fff349]SWAP[-] the stones with a branch of equal weight
038.text: With the stones in hand, the barrier dissolves before your eyes. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 098[/b].

380.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] a knife from beneath the turtle’s shell
380.text: You curse the sentient who would dare torture a helpless animal like that. The animal nuzzles you appreciatively and wanders off. Gain item [b]Item 1209[/b] and 1 morale.

381.text: You swim around behind the vehicle and enter the cabin, taking control. However, the turtle refuses to budge. You can either lose a flora or food card or 1 morale to force the turtle to move; if you do either, gain vehicle [b]Item 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

382.text: You scour the area in the hopes of finding the source of the damaged rock, and you find a katana in the bushes. Gain item [b]Item 889[/b].

383.text: The wood sentient watches helplessly as you assert your size and strength to remove the hammock from the trees. Gain item [b]Item 954[/b] and curse [b]Item 1386[/b].

384.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1214[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, the chest clamps onto your fingers and won’t let go (end your turn).

385.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the ruins of any items they contain
385.text: Gain [fff349]1 take[-] and go to interior [b]Location 544[/b].

386.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

387.text: You pluck one of the broad, pink flowers. Gain flora [b]Item 1080[/b].

388.action: [fff349]COERCE[-] the guards into letting you pass
388.text: It doesn’t feel good to bully the guards, but you get what you want. Lose 1 morale and go to [b]Location 780[/b].

389.text: You feel a surge of strength from the spicy flower. You may continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower[-] action; if you do, you may reroll any challenge dice once. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

039.text: The markings on the wall provide a rough guide through the void. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

390.text: While popping berries into your mouth (gain 1 morale), you notice a gap in the bushes. A small hole in the wall leads west. You may wiggle through it to go to [b]Location 787[/b].

391.text: You recognize a pattern in the stones that may be helpful. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

392.text: Roll 2 skill dice up to 2 times. If you roll at least [0b955e]1 help[-], gain 2 health. Otherwise lose 1 health.

393.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell [b]Item 1375[/b] and continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

394.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

395.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] a piece of the closest object
395.text: The struggle is real as you try to get close enough to the magnets. When you get there, you manage to hang on long enough to chip off a big enough fragment to craft into something useful. Gain item [b]Item 1184[/b].

396.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via the front door
396.text: The door creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior [b]Location 572[/b].

397.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

398.text: You find a beautiful piece of ice floating near the shore. Gain item [b]Item 1183[/b].

399.text: The liquid is clear, crisp, and incredibly refreshing. Gain 1 health and continue.

040.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] the crystal from the center of the planet
040.text: With great effort you pry the crystal loose as energy surges through your body. You blink, and when your eyes open, you’re back on the surface with the crystal in your hands. Gain item [b]Item 1000[/b] and go to [b]Location 157[/b]; if you have a previous location card for reference, return it to the box.

400.text: A sophisticated firewall offers heavy resistance, but you break through to a flood of data. The tower is monitoring the position of all energy sentients to the west, and you suspect something nefarious at play. The data also shows a massive surge of energy from the northeast, but there’s a level of reverence to it. Before you unplug, you siphon a few credits into your augsuit. Gain ability [b]Item 1472[/b], $3, and 1 boost.

401.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] for lost coins in the area
401.text: You find a few coins stuck in the mud. Gain $3.

402.text: The forest to the left is full of healthy, pliable trees. Gain item [b]Item 1180[/b].

403.text: You notice that the top of the fence is protected by an electric surge. You carefully disarm the fence and gain 1 boost. You may continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SCALE[/b][-] action.

404.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the ruins of any items they contain
404.text: With great agility, you reach the old building and scour it for items. Gain ability [b]Item 1511[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 545[/b].

405.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

406.text: The diminutive beast scampers away, using the island as a barrier between you and it. When you close in, it lashes out with a quick series of bites. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-]. Gain animal [b]Item 834[/b].

407.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

408.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] the only item you can reach through a window
408.text: You shimmy along the cliff, reach inside, and extract a rusty axe. Gain item [b]Item 1088[/b].

409.text: The power of the spires surges into you. Gain spell [b]Item 1371[/b].

041.text: The rogue’s gallery is covered in sketches of suspicious-looking sentients. Choose one:

choices.option: Grab a wanted poster of a water sentient
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-], and quest [b]Item 1674[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

choices.option: Gather intel from the parchments
choices.outcome: You learn of several lost sentients who were last seen searching underground for the Cave of Souls. Gain 2 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-].

410.action: [fff349]ROB[-] the house when the owners are asleep
410.text: You creep into the home (go to interior [b]Location 573[/b] and lose 1 morale).

411.action: [fff349]FORAGE[-] in the bushes for fresh berries
411.text: In addition to some juicy berries, you find an old box of cards. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions) and 1 health.

412.text: You embrace a passing sentient as if they’re an old friend, pocketing a few coins from their purse as you do. Gain $X; you may continue.

413.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

414.text: In the rubble you find a harpoon bow. Gain item [b]Item 960[/b] and continue with any action other than [a84fc0]look-[b]SEARCH[/b][-].

415.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1028[/b] and 2 boost.

416.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1193[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

417.text: It’s difficult to wrest away any of the sentient’s possessions, but you manage to take a wooden key. Before you walk away, the devastated sentient offers you their loyalty if you’ll return the key. You may gain either item [b]Item 916[/b] or sentient [b]Item 1318[/b].

418.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].

419.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

042.text: A map of the world appears on the screen, and you send it to a nearby printer. Gain item [b]Item 1037[/b] and 1 boost, then go to city [b]Location 041[/b].

440.text: The animal buzzes as you disrupt its task, struggling against your grasp. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Gain animal [b]Item 814[/b].

Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

choices.option: Access the building (pay [fff349]1 take[-] or 1 boost)
choices.outcome: The lock swings open and you slip inside. Go to interior [b]Location 574[/b].

choices.option: Access the orb
choices.outcome: Look at page 5 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SE-2. Gain 1 boost.

Stay here for a moment and attempt to calm the frightened animal
choices.outcome: The delay gives the animal’s nearby parent time to rescue its youngling. The much larger beast barrels into you and scurries off with the youngling. Lose 1 health and gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Yes
No
choices.outcome: The sand centipede turns toward a hole in the ceiling and darts upward at great velocity. It bursts into daylight, and you’re tossed upward, landing on the edge of a cliff. Go to [b]Location 400[/b].

481.text: You find some pieces of lava that are pliable but not scalding hot. Gain item [b]Item 1182[/b].

You steer it over to the sentients, who latch on and ride it to safety. They cheer your ingenuity and express their gratitude with a gift. Gain item [b]Item 1252[/b] and 2 morale; the sentients highlight your current location (view page 10 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region G). You may also lose 1 time to gain the runecaster ([b]Item 1029[/b]).

486.text: You’re most excited by the boat you see, though you would need to jump over a gap in the ground to reach it. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

488.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 983[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

489.text: The animals could easily fly away, but curiosity gets the better of them and they hover too close. Gain animal [b]Item 826[/b] and 1 boost.

Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

491.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

492.text: Your selfish gesture draws the ire of the owner of the sled, a circuit sentient who makes their living transporting people down the mountain. Either keep the sled for yourself (gain vehicle [b]Item 931[/b] and curse [b]Item 1396[/b]) or simply pay $3 to the sentient to transport you downhill. Either way, go north to [b]Location 351[/b].

493.text: The diaphanous beast proves difficult to grasp. At first it thinks you’re playing a game, but it struggles when it realizes your intent. Gain animal [b]Item 822[/b].

494.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1083[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

495.action: [fff349]PICKPOCKET[-] some locals so you can afford to hail a ride
495.text: The locals are too preoccupied with staying atop the slippery cliffside to notice your pilfering. Gain $X; you may continue.

496.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

499.action: [fff349]ROB[-] the house when the owners are asleep
499.text: You creep into the home (go to interior [b]Location 579[/b] and lose 1 morale).

050.text: You recognize a pattern in the airflow through the cave. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

500.text: The lava melts through your augsuit before you reach the tower; suffer 1 heat damage. Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

501.text: Reaching the device requires you to move across a lava field; suffer 1 heat damage. The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1031[/b] and 2 boost.

503.text: The orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-1. Gain 1 boost.

504.action: [fff349]DISTRACT[-] the pirates to give the sailboat time to escape
504.text: With great pageantry, you lure the pirates close enough that the smaller boat has time to sail away. You are their new target, however, so you must immediately go east to [b]Location 505[/b] or west to [b]Location 503[/b]; gain 1 morale.

505.text: You play with the sentient for a few minutes, getting close enough to lift a playing card and some coins from their pocket. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions) and $3.

506.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

507.text: “If you’re looking to forge an alliance with these underwater people, there is no greater challenge than to complete the Trial of Strength to the northeast. How long can you hold your breath?” Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

508.text: Not only does the animal struggle against your efforts to wrangle it, but you have to outwit the overzealous poachers as it does. Gain animal [b]Item 847[/b].

509.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

510.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] the most beautiful item from the cottage
510.text: The hardcover tome catches your eye; gain item [b]Item 1045[/b]. You may push your luck to try to steal another item before the sentient notices. If you do, roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times. If the final result includes a pair or three-of-a-kind, gain item [b]Item 858[/b] (in addition, the extra bonus for three-of-a-kind is to gain the 3 skills and $3). If not, you’re caught in the act and lose item [b]Item 1045[/b]. Either way, exit to [b]Location 476[/b].

511.text: As you reach for a piece of fruit, you realize that there is one fewer piece in the basket than there was a few seconds ago. Gain item [b]Item 1224[/b] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]SOLVE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 1.

512.text: You recognize a pattern in the beams of light pulsing from the lorestones. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

513.text: The sentient seems to prefer their current position, but they reluctantly join you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1327[/b].

514.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the island of the golden object
514.text: It takes all your strength to wrest the amulet away from its invisible tether. As you do, the lorestones grow dim. Gain item [b]Item 1035[/b] and curse [b]Item 1393[/b].

515.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the sand with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson [b]Item 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

516.text: The tree has shed some pleasantly shaped twigs, and you scoop them up. Gain item [b]Item 1180[/b].

517.text: Heavily favoring their left side, the smelter dusts some sand off the wing with pride in their creation. “Hello, old friend. I’m honored to present your fully functional spaceship, right on schedule. I—” The sentient tumbles from their perch, landing in the desert below. You rush to their side as the fire in their heart burns its last flame. Lose 1 morale and gain vehicle [b]Item 1033[/b].

518.text: The door opens to reveal a room filled with cushions and the haze of smoke. Several sentients are reclining nearby, oblivious to you. An elaborate pipe rests in the middle of the room. Choose one:

choices.option: Consume a small amount of the pipe’s contents
Steal some coins from an oblivious gold sentient

519.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the hull of the local shipwright office
519.text: A landlocked shipwright doesn’t have much to offer other than an old map or their services. Choose one:

choices.option: Rob them of the map
Enlist the shipwright to join you for a journey

520.text: The lantern store owner is befuddled that a corporeal sentient like you would want a lantern. Choose one:

choices.option: Ask about lanterns
choices.outcome: They explain that energy sentients live inside lanterns. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost as you feel the warm glow of a lantern.

choices.option: Pay $6 to gain a lantern
Steal a lantern
Assist the lantern maker with their craft to gain some spare change

521.text: Circuit sentients lounging in a circle take turns inhaling from a large hookah. Choose one:

choices.option: Recline in the lounge without trying the hookah
choices.outcome: Roll 5 skill dice. Gain 1 morale for each [0b955e]help[-] result, then gain 1 health.

choices.option: Consume a tiny breath of hookah

522.text: Half a dozen cameras and scanning devices grant you permission to enter the security store. The owner, however, is quite friendly. Choose one:

choices.option: Steal a map showing various buildings around the world that may or may not have security systems
Hack into their security system to test for weaknesses as a favor

523.text: The lines etched into the Hall of Souls follow the paths of crystals—or “soulstones,” as the stone sentients say—over the course of many generations. Choose one:

choices.option: Gather information about the paths
choices.outcome: Your curiosity earns the admiration of the Soulkeeper. Gain sentient [b]Item 1348[/b].

choices.option: Place a soulstone in the Hall (lose 1 crystal)
choices.outcome: The Soulkeeper appreciates your generosity, and they overlook how you may have originally obtained the crystal. Gain spell [b]Item 1368[/b].

choices.option: Consume a few crisp leaves
choices.outcome: Gain 2 health. The nearby sentients nod appreciatively, commenting on how it’s good to see others adopting their vegetarian ways.

choices.option: Steal an entire plant when no one is looking, which is all too easy, given that each of these sentients has only one eye

525.text: The smell of warm bread wafts off the bakery conveyor belt. Choose one:

choices.option: Pocket a loaf when the proprietor isn’t looking
Consume a few scraps to assist the baker with quality control

526.text: As you admire the paintings in the art gallery, two artists argue over who is more generous. They each offer you something. Gain either a map of treasure chests ([b]Item 1260[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location [view page 17 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region K]) or a handful of coins (gain $15).

527.text: Steam rises from the geothermal pool. Choose one:

choices.option: Bathe in the warm pool
Extract a crystal from the pool bed

528.text: The towering military cemetery is covered in blue crystals honoring those who gave their lives in the line of duty. Choose one:

choices.option: Honor the dead
Steal a crystal from the cemetery

529.text: A vendor at a busy street market showcases their array of wares. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Pay $4 for a pair of flippers
Brazenly steal an aether lantern

choices.option: Catch the smaller animal and run away
Catch the larger animal and run away

choices.option: Steal from the purse of a blissfully unaware sentient
Consume a series of memories of a famous explorer
