602.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1090[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

603.text: It’s only by sheer luck that you grab the same wiring that the animal is flying away with. With a tug you bring the bird-like creature to the ground. Gain animal [b]Item 820[/b].

604.text: Convince the sentient that you can care for the yellow crystal better than they can. They clearly comprehend you, but their state of shock prevents them from clearly thinking through the consequences of giving up their prized possession. Lose 1 morale and gain item [b]Item 1164[/b].

605.text: The sentients are too busy warming themselves by the fire to notice you taking your pick of their weapons. Gain either a mighty machete (item [b]Item 919[/b]) or a bow and arrow set (item [b]Item 956[/b]).

606.text: You avoid getting tangled in their many wires as you pin the sentient’s arms and wrench free a cold blade. You let them keep the other. Gain item [b]Item 915[/b].

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and continue as the beasts amble by.
Catch a small animal, angering the parent (lose 1 health and gain animal [b]Item 812[/b]).
Catch the big animal while their calves scatter (gain animal [b]Item 812[/b]).

608.text: The machine floods your implant with data. You can’t read it, but it’s presented almost like an endlessly scrolling page of news and other information. You randomly select a link for your implant to download. Visit orb.stonemaiergames.com and enter [b]Location 111[/b], [b]Location 171[/b], or [b]Location 208[/b].

609.text: You scrape at the sled until it breaks free of the ice. Gain vehicle [b]Item 931[/b] and $3.

610.text: As slow as the dinosaur-like creature is, it’s so stable on its feet that you have difficulty wrangling it. Gain animal [b]Item 810[/b].

611.text: Following your instincts, you attune with the obelisk and find that you can control its size and movement. It shifts from its levitating position and shrinks to fit into your bag. Gain item [b]Item 1025[/b].

612.text: There’s still a bit of life in part of the nearby circuit board. Gain item [b]Item 1190[/b].

613.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

614.text: As difficult as it is to reach and secure the eye, you’re surprised to find that the sentient doesn’t resist; rather, they seem relieved. Gain item [b]Item 1012[/b] and 1 morale.

615.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1030[/b] and 2 boost.

616.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell [b]Item 1371[/b] and continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

617.text: From what you can tell, these circuit boards contain information about the cities of the world. The port appears to be semi-compatible with your augsuit. The current user of this information is located to the north. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

618.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] a cord from one of the masks
618.text: The one mask goes silent, and the other mask actually seems grateful that they’re the only voice in the room. A panel opens in the rock and out slides a small package—a gift, you presume. Gain item [b]Item 869[/b] and continue.

619.text: The theft infuriates the sentient, and they threaten to curse you if you don’t return the tool immediately. You may either return the tool (gain 2 boost and continue) or keep it (gain item [b]Item 873[/b] and curse [b]Item 1396[/b]).

620.text: You carefully unplug the wires from the box and remove it (gain item [b]Item 948[/b]). As you do, the sentient is released from their chains and falls to the ground in a heap. If you have food or an animal, also gain sentient [b]Item 1326[/b].

621.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]MEMORIZE[/b][-] action.

622.text: Without the crown, their face is much less intimidating—they look a bit sheepish, really. “Can you please return my warhelm?” they ask. Choose one:

choices.option: Return the warhelm
choices.outcome: They thank you by sharing the fundamentals of mind magic. Gain lesson [b]Item 1429[/b].

choices.option: Keep the warhelm

623.text: As you chew on the petal, you feel an instant boost to your memory. You may continue; if you do, gain 1 boost and 1 random skill. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

624.text: With a sharp tug, the wire comes crashing down. It will serve as an excellent grappling hook. Gain item [b]Item 905[/b].

625.text: Avoiding direct skin contact with the powerful crystal, you remove it from the cradle and threaten any sentient from challenging you. You’ve crossed a line, though, and you’re swarmed by angry circuit sentients. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Gain item [b]Item 1009[/b].

626.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] a panel from the side of the building and slip inside
626.text: It’s almost too easy to break into the structure. Go to interior [b]Location 581[/b].

627.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of crystals, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

628.text: Whistling nonchalantly, you slip the pliers into your augsuit pocket. Gain item [b]Item 883[/b].

629.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] one of the animal’s thick tentacles from where it’s wedged into the cliff
629.text: You hear a sound like a computer rebooting, and the animal slowly returns to life. Gain animal [b]Item 808[/b].

630.text: The vehicle seems to be on autopilot, which you easily override. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1010[/b] and $2.

631.action: [fff349]FORAGE[-] for an elegant piece of seaweed
631.text: Amidst gently waving plants, you find item [b]Item 1181[/b].

632.text: It has a salty, acidic taste that leaves welts on your tongue. Gain 1 boost; unless you continue, lose 1 health.

633.text: The creature is quite slippery, like a wet balloon. Finally you wrangle it. Gain animal [b]Item 806[/b].

634.text: You find some aquatic mushrooms growing from the nutrient-rich ocean shelves: Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b].

635.text: Your entire body begins to glow, illuminating the surrounding area with perfect clarity. You may continue with a [a84fc0]look[-] action, changing the result of 1 challenge die to another die face. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

636.text: You exploit the sea spout’s own momentum to extract the sentient. The two of you are sent hurtling to the west. Gain sentient [b]Item 1347[/b] and go to [b]Location 430[/b].

637.text: You feel energized beyond what you would call natural. Gain lesson [b]Item 1424[/b]. You may continue; if you do, gain [a84fc0]1 look[-].

638.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

639.text: You don’t settle for a good bone—you find a great one! Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].

640.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via a side window
640.text: The guards are focused on sentients trying to avoid the outpost, not enter it. Go to interior [b]Location 582[/b].

641.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of blue crystals, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

642.text: The beast seems more than willing to follow your directions and welcomes you into its cavernous, oxygenated mouth. You may hitch a ride northwest to [b]Location 476[/b], northeast to [b]Location 478[/b], southeast to [b]Location 647[/b], or southwest to [b]Location 635[/b]. When you arrive, ignore the hypoxia damage (if any).

643.action: [fff349]GRAB[-] onto an animal as it darts north
643.text: The animal doesn’t seem to mind the extra weight. Go to [b]Location 644[/b].

644.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

645.text: The sentient is just as impressed as they are bewildered that you pulled a fast one on them, and they let you keep the weapon without a fight. Gain item [b]Item 1038[/b].

646.action: [fff349]MOUNT[-] the creature like a great underwater steed
646.text: Infuriated by your lack of respect, the sentient has you forcibly removed from the water. Gain curse [b]Item 1385[/b]. All fades to black, and when you wake up, you’re on location [b]Location 139[/b].

647.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]FIGHT[/b][-] action.

648.text: The kelp tastes strongly of blood. You fight through the flavor, hoping that you don’t develop vampiric tendencies. You may remove a boost from a sentient in your grid; if you do, gain 1 health and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

649.text: There are several gaps big enough to reach inside the shipwreck. Gain ability [b]Item 1511[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 012[/b].

650.action: [fff349]PICKPOCKET[-] the sentient while pretending to console them
650.text: The motion of the currents makes your deft pilfering indetectable. Gain $X.

651.text: You grab onto the animal and spiral toward the ocean floor until it stops fighting back. Gain animal [b]Item 850[/b].

652.text: You descend upon the guard wielding the pikestaff; with a clever twist, the weapon is yours. Gain item [b]Item 1210[/b] and continue.

653.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped due to exposure to the salt water. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1161[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 885[/b]. Otherwise, a trap springs out of the chest, knocking the air from your lungs (suffer 1 hypoxia damage).

654.text: This area is void of other sea life— clearly, there is danger among these beautiful creatures. Whether you move or cut your way through, precision is necessary. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

655.text: On the ocean floor you find some intact sheets of glass. Gain item [b]Item 1194[/b].

656.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.option: Keep the stone
Drop the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone sinks, but not far—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

657.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell [b]Item 1380[/b] and continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

658.text: You may immediately move north or west; if you do, don’t suffer hypoxia damage upon arrival. Otherwise, continue.

659.text: Despite the Traveler’s warning, you can’t resist the allure of treasure. Gain item [b]Item 1083[/b] and $10. As soon as the gravekeeper sees your transgression, they curse you (gain curse [b]Item 1385[/b]) and attack. Continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆6-[b]DEFEND[/b][-] action.

660.text: The eel-like creature twists and turns, trying to throw you off. It drags you toward the anemone field to the west. Choose one:

choices.option: Let go of the eel
Hang on to the eel
choices.outcome: Lose 1 health and gain animal [b]Item 848[/b]; go to [b]Location 654[/b].

661.text: A vehicle-creature hybrid meanders over to you, and you take the opportunity to grab the reins and steer it as you wish. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it, and gain $3.

662.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via a side window
662.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior [b]Location 584[/b].

663.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] for lost items in the tall grass near the stone
663.text: You locate an old playing card. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions).

664.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the grass with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson [b]Item 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

665.text: The short sentient, their head barely peeking above the long grass, is wearing a translation device. You forcefully rob them of it. Gain item [b]Item 891[/b] and curse [b]Item 1386[/b].

666.action: [fff349]HACK[-] the device floating in front of the tree
666.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but thanks to your ingenuity and the tree’s advice, you are able to pair it to you. Gain item [b]Item 1027[/b].

667.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] from the couple while their attention is on each other
667.text: You don’t feel great about it, but you’re excited by what you find. Lose 1 morale and gain item [b]Item 949[/b] and $6.

668.text: Just like the tiny cockroaches that have survived every interplanetary war, this insect is difficult to catch. Unlike the cockroaches you know, this one bites back. Gain animal [b]Item 853[/b].

669.text: You take the most plump mushroom in the field. Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b].

670.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a petal from the lotus near the rune
670.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

671.text: Gain a sticky stick ([b]Item 1180[/b]) or a leafy leaf ([b]Item 1181[/b]).

672.text: The sentient begs you not to take their fishing pole, as it is their livelihood. Choose one:

choices.option: Take the fishing pole despite the sentient’s request
Respect their wishes and agree not to steal the fishing pole
choices.outcome: The sentient rewards you with a bag of fish and some old playing cards. Gain 1 health and 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions).

673.text: The sentient isn’t carrying much, just a few coins and a well-worn deck of cards. Gain $3 and 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions).

674.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] some fresh fruit from the animal’s basket without the animal noticing
674.text: Gain item [b]Item 1224[/b]. The animal doesn’t notice your sticky fingers; you may continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]SHARE[/b][-] action.

675.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 973[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions). Otherwise, gain $4.

676.text: The sentient freely offers either their only possession (gain a recipe book, item [b]Item 1223[/b]) or their expertise as an herbalist (gain sentient [b]Item 1350[/b]). If you pay [fff349]1 take[-], you may instead gain an antidote ([b]Item 865[/b]).

677.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of berries, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

678.text: It seems that the convincing factors are your feet, the likes of which are fascinating to the sentient. Gain sentient [b]Item 1363[/b].

679.text: Hoping that the spooky fungus won’t follow you, you access the orb. Inside you see a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 6 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SW-4. Gain 1 boost.

680.text: The nimble animal nearly evades you, but you snare its legs and it crashes to the ground. Gain animal [b]Item 854[/b].

681.text: You identify a pattern in the silky strands. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

682.action: [fff349]ROB[-] the house when the owners are asleep
682.text: You creep into the home (go to interior [b]Location 586[/b] and lose 1 morale). You may not choose the [fd8c46]engage-[b]PERSUADE[/b][-] action there on any future turn.

683.text: The sentient is either gullible or generous, but the result is the same to you. Gain item [b]Item 1213[/b].

684.text: Sometimes the best way to avoid a trap is to surprise it. You spring onto the large beetle hiding on the tree to the left, grabbing its pincers and wrestling it to the platform. Gain animal [b]Item 1221[/b].

685.text: The berry is plump and delicious, and you immediately feel a surge of adrenaline. You may continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower[-] action, ignoring any time results on challenge dice. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

686.text: The variety of trees offer a variety of choices, and among them you find a particularly impressive branch (gain item [b]Item 1180[/b]).

687.text: A hulking creature looms to the direct north, and massive trees touch the clouds to the northwest and northeast. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

688.text: Your cerebral implant displays a bypass code to circumvent a cavern barrier. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

689.action: [fff349]GRAB[-] the cats by the scruff of their necks
689.text: Your kittens have never liked when you do this, and their claws are quite sharp. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [0b955e]help[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [0b955e]1 help[-]. Gain animal [b]Item 827[/b].

690.text: Snooping around, you learn that this site was once a hub for worldwide travel, but the portals fell into disrepair. A key element required for fixing the gateways is a spell for controlling the space between things, and there are rumors of such sorcery also powering a mysterious box of pure light to the northeast. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

691.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] the source of the light from among the roots
691.text: With the dexterity of someone half your age, you bend and twist into the roots. Inside, you find a glowing shard. Gain item [b]Item 1225[/b].

692.text: One does not simply catch a blossom hulk, but it doesn’t seem to mind you trying to mount it. Gain animal [b]Item 841[/b].

693.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SCALE[/b][-] action.

694.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the ruins of any items they contain
694.text: Gain [fff349]1 take[-] and go to interior [b]Location 546[/b].

695.text: The barn is empty except for a few saddles. Gain item [b]Item 958[/b].

696.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

697.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

698.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.option: Keep the stone
Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

699.action: [fff349]PICKPOCKET[-] a few travelers along the path
699.text: The travelers are surprised by the break in the path, and they don’t notice you taking a few coins from their pockets. Gain $X; you may continue.

700.text: You take a beautiful piece of ivory from the skeleton. Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].

701.text: As you access the box, you feel all of your possessions peel away from you.If you have any sentients, animals, flora, or items, they remain on this location (set them aside on location [b]Location 701[/b]; refresh any challenge dice on them and keep any boost on them. You will regain them automatically if you return here in the future). When you step out of the box, you’re at a different location ([b]Location 369[/b]), unarmed and vulnerable to the haunting elemental looming over you; ignore the “upon arrival” instructions and read entry [b]Location 369[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

702.text: The creature lurking behind the lotus lashes out protectively, briefly impeding your path to the flower before scuttling away. The taste of the lotus reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

703.text: You embrace the hulk like an old friend, a gesture to which they’re too shocked to respond. Gain item [b]Item 1261[/b] and $4.

704.text: The orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 6 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SW-2. Gain 1 boost.

705.text: The animal, hoping for a friend, is taken aback by the aggressive approach. Gain animal [b]Item 838[/b].

706.text: Your act of mercy gives the injured animal time to get away while its pursuers turn their attention to you. You stand firm over your captive, and they eventually fly away. Gain animal [b]Item 840[/b].

707.text: You realize you’re not alone in the serene valley, and you set your sights on a target to the north. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

708.text: The sentient isn’t armed with anything other than some climbing gear. Gain item [b]Item 884[/b].

709.text: With a firm tug, the rope comes tumbling from above. Gain item [b]Item 903[/b].

710.text: You make your way through a small crowd that has gathered to admire the view, pocketing a few coins from their purse as you do. Gain $X; you may continue.

711.text: The lizard-like beast is slow but strong. Gain animal [b]Item 837[/b].

712.text: The runecaster’s internals are a complex and nearly impenetrable array of machinery, but you are able to pair it to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1031[/b] and 2 boost.

713.text: Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

714.text: The sentient reveals that a long-forgotten truce between stone and wind sentients resulted in a few select sentients like them learning the secrets to cloudcrafting. You convince them that you’re an emissary from the wind sentients, and they reluctantly share their knowledge with you. Gain spell [b]Item 1379[/b].

715.text: The sentient scans the area for any other soul-seekers. Finding no other takers, they join you for your journey. Gain sentient [b]Item 1348[/b].

716.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.option: Keep the stone
Drop the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

717.text: The warm water feels amazing as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

718.text: The sentient is eager to join you, and they urge you to head west for reasons you don’t quite understand. Gain sentient [b]Item 1345[/b].

719.text: You push aside some rubble to find a long-forgotten entrance to the hostel. Go to interior [b]Location 013[/b].

720.text: You take a beautiful piece of ivory from the skeleton. Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].

721.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]CALCULATE[/b][-] action.

722.text: You watch as a sentient walks up to the ledge and steps off. They drop into the clouds but are instantly bounced up to the other side. Tears stream down their face as they walk away. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

723.action: [fff349]SCAVENGE[-] for lost items in the moss near the stone
723.text: You locate an old playing card. Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions).

724.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Unfortunately, the commotion awakens the nearby stoneskin lizard. It pounces on you, scattering the chest’s contents across the crag. Lose 1 health and gain 1 boost. If you pay [fff349]1 take[-], also gain animal [b]Item 837[/b].

725.text: You recognize a well-worn path leading from the sign toward the west. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

726.text: You catch the attention of the angry sentient, giving the others time to scurry to the north. They drop a token of their appreciation on the ground for you to pick up. Gain item [b]Item 876[/b].

727.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of court documents, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

728.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] the sentient’s bag after they jump
728.text: Inside you find a rope, some coins, and a slate with a description of a lost pet. Gain item [b]Item 902[/b], $3, and quest [b]Item 1650[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

729.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell [b]Item 1368[/b] and continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

730.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] one of the torches in the ground
730.text: Several oil torches are scattered around the base of the mining operation. Gain item [b]Item 1085[/b].

731.text: Curiously, some of the wreckage isn’t from your ship. It appears to have drifted on the tide from the north. Gain either some metal scraps ([b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board ([b]Item 1190[/b]).

732.text: Gain ability [b]Item 1511[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 791[/b].

733.text: You manage to sneak through the jungle to the pearl, but when you touch it, your mind goes blank, save for three glowing symbols. Choose life (gain spell [b]Item 1236[/b]), spirit (gain spell [b]Item 1237[/b]), or mind (gain spell [b]Item 1238[/b]).

734.text: You reach into the rift and grab blindly at anything you can remove. Your fingers grasp something wet and slimy, and you find yourself holding a giant piece of seaweed from the past. Gain flora [b]Item 1061[/b].

735.text: The creature is so focused on their task that they don’t notice you reaching into the transparent orb and removing their few possessions. Gain item [b]Item 941[/b] and $2.

736.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] a shard of glass from the sand
736.text: As you take the shard, you realize just how many tiny pieces of glass are in the sand. They are unavoidable if you travel north. Gain item [b]Item 1194[/b] and curse [b]Item 1390[/b].

737.action: [fff349]ROB[-] the house when the owners are asleep
737.text: You creep into the home (go to interior [b]Location 588[/b] and lose 1 morale).

738.text: You quietly push off into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b] and $4.

739.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] the first precious item you find on the island
739.text: You nimbly-yet-quietly swing from a tree to the east onto the island and land on top of a rusted, vine-covered mech. Suddenly, 3 pirate guards attack from above. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Gain vehicle [b]Item 984[/b].

740.text: The sentient is frantic with concern regarding a tree that was in this grove the last time they checked. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

741.text: You recognize a pattern in the masonry—this isn’t an entirely natural arch. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

742.text: The sentient indulges you as if you are a child, rolling their eye and giving you their purse. They predict you will soon lose the money at the casinos to the north. Gain curse [b]Item 1390[/b], $5, and 1 boost.

743.action: [fff349]PICKPOCKET[-] the sentient as you greet them
743.text: The sentient’s thrashing gives you ample cover for a quick act of pilfering. Gain item [b]Item 1251[/b].

744.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building while the sentients are distracted by a large creature to the east
744.text: The building is open-air, so you walk right in. Go to interior [b]Location 587[/b].

745.text: You quietly set sail into open water without anyone noticing. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1156[/b] and $3.

746.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

747.text: The creature is quite nimble—it doesn’t have the legs to outrun you, but it avoids your grasp for a while and bares sharp teeth if you catch it from the wrong angle. Gain animal [b]Item 834[/b] and 1 boost.

748.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of clocks, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

749.text: The taste of the petal reminds you a bit of raw artichoke. Roll 3 skill dice. For each [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[0b955e]help[-] result, gain 1 boost/morale/health (respectively). Then, for each [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, lose 1 boost/morale/health (respectively).

750.text: Rarely is “disarm” taken so literally as with this beast. With a mighty swing, you slice cleanly through one of its eight arms, the tentacle writhing on the surf. The kraken takes to the sea while the residents prepare a feast using the meat as the main course. They present you with a gift. Gain item [b]Item 899[/b], 1 health, and [fff349]1 take[-].

751.text: The naive youngster doesn’t know any better, agreeing to give you their sole possession for one of yours. Lose 1 card to gain animal [b]Item 834[/b].

752.text: You get close enough to grab onto the elemental for several seconds, during which you can feel some of its power transfer to you. Gain spell [b]Item 1381[/b] and continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

753.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] a blue vial from the rider in the back
753.text: The sentient is on high alert, but you seem to find yourself in the exact best position every time they glance around. Gain item [b]Item 862[/b] and continue.

754.text: The judges wink and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SPEED[/b][-] action.

755.text: You find some climbing gear. Gain item [b]Item 904[/b].

756.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped from exposure to the elements. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1189[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

757.text: Amidst the rubble near a cave, you find an excellent stone. Choose one:

choices.option: Keep the stone
Throw the stone into the cave
choices.outcome: The stone strikes a nearby target—perhaps the cave isn’t nearly as deep as you thought. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

758.text: You climb just above the animal’s snout and hang on for dear life, all the while steering it into the jungle until it calms down. Gain animal [b]Item 832[/b].

759.text: One second you have the staff in your hands as you spring away, and the next you’re back where you started. You try it again with the same result. Finally you grab the staff and wave it around instead of running. You can’t explain the result, but both sentients disappear. Gain item [b]Item 934[/b].

076.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a taste of the white flakes
076.text: You feel a tingling sensation spread across your tongue. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b] and continue.

760.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via a side window
760.text: You pull yourself through a second-level window. Go to interior [b]Location 561[/b].

761.text: With a deft flick of the wrist, you dislodge the rope from the wall. Gain item [b]Item 903[/b].

762.text: The sentient is happy to join you, but only if you exit the city to the west or south. If you agree, gain sentient [b]Item 1328[/b]. Otherwise, if you prefer to travel elsewhere, gain 1 boost.

763.action: [fff349]GRAB[-] a tree branch and hold it as if were a precious item as you walk toward the entrance
763.text: The guards nod appreciatively at your offering and open the doors for you. Go to interior [b]Location 589[/b].

764.text: In their drunken revelry, they don’t notice your hands in their purses. Gain $X; you may continue.

765.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] some of the cargo in the landing zone
765.text: You whistle nonchalantly while dragging away a large crate. Gain item [b]Item 1034[/b].

766.action: [fff349]COERCE[-] the captain to let you board the balloon, threatening to otherwise shoot it down
766.text: This isn’t a good start to your relationship, but you make up a sad story to gain their sympathy. Choose for them to drop you off either in the northwest ([b]Location 461[/b]), north ([b]Location 345[/b]), or northeast ([b]Location 346[/b]).

767.text: You embrace the sentient as if they’re an old friend, pocketing a few coins from their purse as you do. Gain $X; you may continue.

768.text: While the sentient is distracted, you snatch a map from the stand and stick it under your shirt. Gain item [b]Item 1154[/b].

769.action: [fff349]ACCESS[-] the building via a side window
769.text: The window creaks open and you slip inside. Go to interior [b]Location 590[/b].

077.text: The nearest sentient has left their weapon on the ground, so you grab it (gain item [b]Item 1151[/b]). Before the other sentient can pick up their crossbow, if you pay 1 boost, you can grab it too (gain item [b]Item 1152[/b]). The helpless sentients fall silent and refuse to engage; exit to [b]Location 346[/b] and continue.

770.text: You furtively reach into the boat and take a rolled-up parchment before whistling to yourself and walking away. Gain item [b]Item 1258[/b] and continue; if you pay [fff349]1 take[-], you can loot the boat itself (gain vehicle [b]Item 1156[/b]).

771.text: Through a series of clever social and legal maneuvers, you wrest control of the ship away from the captain. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1016[/b] and $8.

772.action: [fff349]HIJACK[-] the vessel and dock it away from the sentient
772.text: Seeing that you’re not leaving the city, the sentient disappears underwater. The captain of the ship is just relieved that they avoided the coast guard. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1015[/b] and $5.

773.text: You recognize a pattern in the stones and potential in the tiny gateway. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

774.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] the axe when the sentient isn’t looking
774.text: The sentient is preoccupied by their blacksmithing or too trusting or both. Gain item [b]Item 872[/b].

775.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] a parchment from the sentient as you pass on the path
775.text: When the sentient is out of sight, you open the parchment to find instructions to assassinate the King of Souls. Gain 1 boost, [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-], and quest [b]Item 1635[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

776.text: You weave a web of lies about who you are and the poor quality of the garments. You don’t feel good about it (lose 1 morale), but your sharp tongue results in a deep discount on a warm coat; you may pay $2 to gain item [b]Item 922[/b].

777.action: [fff349]COERCE[-] the guard let you enter the building
777.text: The guard admires your tactics and takes you on a shortcut inside. Gain 1 time and go to interior [b]Location 583[/b].

778.text: The fruit looks good on the outside, and you take a risky bite. Roll X dice. If the results include at least [0b955e]1 help[-], gain item [b]Item 1224[/b] and 1 health. Otherwise lose 1 health and gain 1 boost.

779.action: [fff349]FORAGE[-] for some strong vines along the wall
779.text: You find some healthy, sturdy vines. Gain item [b]Item 1181[/b].

078.action: [fff349]CONSUME[-] a fleck of the white substance from the air
078.text: You feel a tingling sensation spread across your tongue. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b] and continue.

780.text: The water feels great as it flows over you, washing off the grime. Gain 1 health.

781.text: With a well-calculated gesture, you tear away what at first appears to be a weapon but is actually some sort of metal sieve. Choose one:

choices.option: Return it to its owner
choices.outcome: They thank you profusely and offer you a reward (gain $10) or their services as a guide (gain sentient [b]Item 1336[/b]).

choices.option: Keep it
choices.outcome: Its owner yells at you as you walk away. Gain item [b]Item 980[/b] and curse [b]Item 1390[/b].

782.action: [fff349]ROB[-] the sentient in their moment of weakness
782.text: The sentient puts up no resistance. Gain $5.

783.action: [fff349]COERCE[-] the sentient into granting you access to the bank vault
783.text: The Traveler is helpless to intervene as you bully the sentient. The sentient leads you into a hidden cave-like entrance to the bank. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] to force the sentient to provide a secret phrase to the guardian
Release the sentient as you face the guardian alone

784.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the ruins of any items they contain
784.text: You slip deftly into the ruins. Go to interior [b]Location 548[/b].

785.action: [fff349]STALL[-] until you can’t hear anyone on the bridge
785.text: While you wait, you may pay 1 boost to gain any 2 skills. You may then go into the city to the northwest ([b]Location 780[/b]) or follow north atop the wall surrounding the city ([b]Location 786[/b]).

786.action: [fff349]DISTRACT[-] the guards and slip inside behind them
786.text: The guards fall for your tomfoolery; go to interior [b]Location 591[/b].

787.text: It takes guts and guile to pickpocket a metal sentient, but you manage to catch this one off guard. Gain item [b]Item 860[/b] and $3.

788.text: It takes all of your cunning to steal a map from the sentient, and they’re so impressed that they offer to accompany you if you give it back. You may gain sentient [b]Item 1339[/b]; if not, gain item [b]Item 1264[/b] (the sentient highlights your current location [view page 21 in the Book of Vantage; you are in region I]).

789.action: [fff349]ROB[-] the sentient of their most expensive weapon
789.text: The sentient shakes their head sadly as you hold them at bay. “There is no glory in this type of theft,” they say. “I’d respect you if you stole something without me seeing you, but this… this is barbaric.” Gain item [b]Item 1038[/b] and curse [b]Item 1391[/b].

079.action: [fff349]GRAB[-] onto a spinning boulder and hang on as it spins around the cavern
079.text: You grow dizzier the longer you hang onto the rock. If you pay [2694d0]1 move[-], you time your dismount perfectly (proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 046[/b]). Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

790.text: Before anyone notices, you tuck the book under your arm and walk away. Gain item [b]Item 1045[/b].

791.text: As you rifle through the ship, you realize that it has all the signs of a scouting vessel for a colony ship, except with one key difference: The ship features 12 compartments, each labeled with a different element, the origins of life on this planet. Gain 2 boost and continue.

795.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the conspicuously empty room, staying on alert
795.text: As you enter the room, a sentient springs from their hiding place to the right. Gain 1 random skill and choose one:

choices.option: Pay [2694d0]1 move[-]
choices.outcome: Dodge the sentient and exit the cathedral to [b]Location 281[/b].

choices.option: Pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]
choices.outcome: You hogtie the intruder and steal the book ([b]Item 1044[/b]), the rifle ([b]Item 1153[/b]), or the talisman ([b]Item 1157[/b]) then exit to [b]Location 281[/b].

choices.option: Do nothing
choices.outcome: The sentient crashes into you, knocking you unconscious with the butt of their rifle. Lose 1 health and exit to [b]Location 281[/b].

799.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the pit of any treasure left behind by less fortunate sentients
799.text: A wealthy sentient fell to their doom here, leaving behind a purse full of coins. Gain $13 and continue.

080.action: [fff349]STEAL[-] a gold zamazingo from the pile when the sentient’s back is turned
080.text: The token is scalding hot, and you’re barely able to hold back a squeal of pain. Lose 1 health and gain item [b]Item 1099[/b].

801.action: [fff349]LOOT[-] the shard from the sky island
801.text: Just in case someone is watching, you wait for clouds to enshroud the area and take the shard. Gain item [b]Item 1707[/b].

081.text: Your augsuit is flooded with data, so it filters the most recent and most prevalent threads. It seems that the circuit sentients have been trying to determine how to unplug from this planet and venture into the unknown, but their entire technological system is wire-based. Gain destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center) and 2 boost.

082.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] the crystal without breaking the ice
082.text: Fortunately, the ice is thick enough to hold your weight as you wiggle the crystal free. Gain item [b]Item 1160[/b] and 1 morale.

083.text: You don’t really know what you’re doing, but your instincts lead you to reach into the gateway and tug the diaphanous membrane into your mind. When you do, all goes black. You wake up on the stairs with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson [b]Item 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost.

084.text: Leaning off the edge, you just barely snap off a small crystal, but you catch your forearm on a sharp rock as you do. Lose 1 health and gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]. You may continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]BALANCE[/b][-] action.

085.text: The sentients are preoccupied by the rowdy contest and don’t notice your pilfering. Gain $X; you may continue.

086.text: Some lava splashes onto a rock, cooling enough that you can pick it up. Gain item [b]Item 1182[/b].

087.text: There are an abundance of torches throughout the mine, so no one will notice if one goes missing. Gain item [b]Item 1086[/b].

088.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] a crystal from among the roots
088.text: It’s difficult to find good footing among the slick moss, but you finally manage to pull out a crystal. Gain item [b]Item 1161[/b].

089.action: [fff349]EXTRACT[-] a crystal from the walls of the cavern
089.text: A fistsize piece of green crystal breaks free. Gain item [b]Item 1163[/b].

090.text: You don’t want to raise the sentinel’s suspicion, so you grab a handful of coins and head for an exit. Gain $10.

091.text: Despite the solid construction of the chest, some of the wood has warped due to the humidity. Soon you’ve dismantled enough of the chest’s exterior to reach inside. Roll 5 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1020[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1036[/b]. Otherwise, gain $8. You may continue.

917.text: Your instincts lead you to reach into the energy flowing through the key. When you do, all goes black. You wake up with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson [b]Item 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost on your character.

092.text: A large piece of the crystal breaks free. Gain item [b]Item 1165[/b].

093.action: [fff349]PILFER[-] some circuit boards from the entrance to the maze
093.text: You carefully extract some exposed circuitry from the wall. Gain item [b]Item 1190[/b] and continue.

094.text: You bump against a sentient whose hands are full of maps, pocketing their loose change. Gain $X; you may continue.

095.text: You have a feeling the mother is nearby, so you remove the closest egg and leave. Gain item [b]Item 1155[/b] and go to cave [b]Location 035[/b].

096.text: You quite literally catch the dragon off guard— apparently others who have ventured into its lair have come to fight, not wrangle. It still puts up quite a struggle. Roll 7 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Gain animal [b]Item 807[/b].

097.text: As far as you can tell, someone has weaponized these devices. You carefully disarm them, and they become a source of good. Gain item [b]Item 865[/b] and 1 morale.

098.action: [fff349]GATHER[-] intel about the labyrinth of roots before proceeding forward
098.text: Based on the position of the doors and bridges, you determine the optimal route. For your next action this turn, decrease the cost by X. Continue.

988.text: Your instincts lead you to reach into the portal generator. When you do, all goes black. You wake up with a throbbing headache, but also a newfound potential. Lose 1 health, gain lesson [b]Item 1428[/b], and gain 1 boost on your character.

099.text: The tour guide and their two guests are surprised by the intrusion, but they’re at the end of the tour, so the couple wanders off and the guide—a rune specialist—agrees to remain with you for a small fee (pay $2 to gain sentient [b]Item 1329[/b]). Whether or not you pay, you may advance deeper into the planet, to dungeon [b]Location 599[/b]. If you do, do not lose health upon arrival, and keep this location for reference.
